cases.title: Python Development History
cases.summary: Python was created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991. It is widely used for automation, web development, and data science.
key_points: Primary use cases: Automation, Web Development, Data Science

cases.title: Memo Update on Login Service
cases.summary: The memo states that the login service now retries failed requests twice, logs timeout errors, and displays a clearer message to users.
key_points: login service retries failed requests twice

cases.title: Lisbon, Portugal
cases.summary: Lisbon is the capital of Portugal. It sits on the Tagus River and is known for its hills and trams.
